title: RELIEF NURSERY - 211info
text: FAMILY NURTURING CENTER JACKSON COUNTY RELIEF NURSERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers comprehensive family support for families with children who are experiencing high levels of stress. Services include therapeutic classrooms with low adult-child ratios, family support and individualized case management, home visiting, parenting education, and group activities designed to strengthen parenting skills and promote healthy child development 825 E Main Street Suite A Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Young children ages 0-5 who are experiencing high levels of stress or who have experienced trauma and/or are at risk for abuse and neglect; parents who have multiple risk factors and are struggling to nurture and care for their children. High-risk families typically experience several of the following factors: poverty, high stress, depression, history of mental illness, lack of reliable transportation, single parenthood, criminal history, adult survivors of child abuse, history with drugs and alcohol, unemployment, low self-esteem, limited education, anger issues, homelessness, or social isolation. Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm Email (541) 779-5242 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 779-5242 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by program LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Jackson County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the corner of 5th Avenue and N Oakdale Avenue Services: Case/Care Management * At Risk Families Child Abuse Prevention Children's Out of Home Respite Care * At Risk Families Family Support Centers/Outreach * At Risk Families Home Based Parenting Education * At Risk Families Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT EDUCATION MATERIAL GOODS - DIAPERS MATERIAL GOODS - LITTLE SPROUTS CLOTHING SWAP SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - TODDLER TUMMY TIME PLAYGROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
